short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $2.07B in FY2025 Q4, +36.8% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $7B — in cyclical drawdown.

Forward EBIT margin: 28.0% — structural premium business over the long-cycle view.

Sector thesis (Information Technology): Multi-year AI/cloud capex cycle remains the dominant secular theme.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if the next 2–4 quarters confirm a stabilization in trajectory.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 131.6% — extreme (binary-event hedging implied).
Put/Call OI: 1.23 — balanced flow.

short_term.strategy: Sell 30–45 DTE cash-secured put at $187 (5% OTM). High IV (132%) + uptrend → collect premium with a willingness to be assigned at a discount. Roll if breached, otherwise let theta decay.

long_term.strategy: Sell 6-month strangle: short $177 put / short $216 call. Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling on both sides; profits if spot stays within ±10%; manage with rolls or assignment.
